info.name: text-insert
info.text: We'll keep dancing until we reach the top.

info.text: We'll keep dancing until we reach the top.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: We will fall into a rhythm and find our way.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: We'll move through the obstacles together.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: We'll move through the obstacles together.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: There is more than one way to move forward.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: We'll take it one step at a time.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: We'll take it one step at a time.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: The way forward is best found with a partner.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress can be achieved in many different styles.

info.text: be only achieved by working together.

info.text: Progress can be achieved by tangoing vigorously forward.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: We'll keep going until we reach the end.

info.text: We'll make progress at our own pace.

info.text: every which way, we make our way to the next destination.

info.text: The rhythm of the beat will carry us forward.
